channel.title: API Vault Updates
channel.description: Most recent updates to API Vault.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
API Vault v1.0.0 — Initial Release

Welcome to the first official release of API Vault, a lightweight macOS utility designed to manage your API keys securely and access them quickly.

Key Features:

  • Secure Keychain Storage: Your API keys are saved directly into the macOS Keychain with hardware-level security.
  • Quick Export: Copy shell export commands (e.g. export OPENAI_API_KEY="...") directly to your clipboard.
  • Preset Gallery: Quick setup for popular services (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS, Stripe, GitHub, etc.) or configure custom APIs.
  • Menu Bar Companion: Access your keys instantly anytime via the macOS system menu bar menu.
  • Native Updater: Seamless, secure background updates powered by the Sparkle framework.
